metadata.instruction: Find the lyrics to "Baby Shark" song on Chrome. Once you find the lyrics, save the webpage as a PDF so I can print it.
metadata.context: I want to print the lyrics to "Baby Shark" song.

actions.window_title: Program Manager

l3.rationale: Clicked Google Chrome in the Program Manager list to launch the app.

l4.rationale: Launched Google Chrome from Program Manager to begin browsing for the song lyrics.

l5.rationale: Initial application launch/navigation before starting the web search.

actions.window_title: New Tab - Google Chrome

l3.rationale: Typed the first character of the search query into the address/search bar.

l4.rationale: Typed the Baby Shark query into Chrome’s address/search bar and submitted it to search the web.

l5.rationale: Typing the query, correcting it, and selecting a search result to locate the lyrics.

actions.window_title: Pinkfong - Baby Shark Lyrics | AZLyrics.com - Google Chrome

l3.rationale: Clicked the Print menu item to open print controls.

l4.rationale: Opened Chrome’s print flow, selected Microsoft Print to PDF, and confirmed Save in the Save As dialog to export the webpage as a PDF.

l5.rationale: Opening print/export controls, choosing Save to PDF, completing the save, and switching back afterward.
